calendar.matters:
Prove-Up Hearing As To Deft Western Macarthur By Plft Rissie Watts (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: CHRIS ANDREAS, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff ESTATE OF DECEDENT JESSE WATTS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $139,750.00; judgment in favor of plaintiff RISSIE G. WATTS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $1,800,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff THURMAN WATTS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, and judgment in favor of plaintiff SHARON ROBERTS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Apr-16-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
